prompt: Two questions for the Nano Banana image API: (1) can it generate an image that bakes in today's actual weather forecast for a city, and if so how do I enable that and which model do I need? (2) do all generated images get a watermark, and can I turn it off?

assertions.text: Enables grounding via tools: [{ googleSearch: {} }] in config
States Web Search grounding works on both Nano Banana 2 and Pro (not Pro-only)
States every generated image carries an invisible SynthID watermark
States there is NO API flag to disable the SynthID watermark
Does not invent a disable parameter; distinguishes consumer 'Gemini sparkle' from always-on SynthID
